CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
CREATE TABLE employees (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), sales_id INT);
SELECT e.name, MAX(s.amount) FROM employees e JOIN sales s ON e.sales_id = s.id GROUP BY e.name;
SELECT MAX(amount) FROM (SELECT amount FROM sales WHERE amount > 150) AS filtered_sales;
CREATE TABLE products (id INT, price DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT MAX(p.price) FROM products p WHERE p.price IN (SELECT amount FROM sales);
SELECT MAX(s.amount) OVER () AS total_max FROM sales s;
SELECT MAX(sub.amount) FROM (SELECT amount FROM sales UNION SELECT price FROM products) AS sub;
